tasks.label: Check live contacts payload
tasks.command: curl -s "https://deved-webpush.ivansherman127.workers.dev/api/data?path=bitrix_contacts_uid.json" | /usr/bin/python3 -c "import sys,json; raw=sys.stdin.read(); arr=json.loads(raw); print('rows',len(arr)); print('keys', sorted(arr[0].keys()) if arr else []); print('sample', arr[0] if arr else {})"
